title: betula papyrifera var. humilis
intro: Betula papyrifera var. humilis, also known as the dwarf birch, is a small shrub or tree species of the paper birch tree, typically found in cooler climates. The medicinal properties of Betula papyrifera var. humilis include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it a popular natural remedy for various health issues. The health benefits associated with this plant include its ability to reduce fever, soothe skin irritations, and alleviate digestive problems. Herbal preparations of Betula papyrifera var. humilis can be made into teas, infusions, and salves, which can be used to treat various ailments.
